page_title: Flowdesk: Focus Amplifier for Remote Professionals

hero.headline: Stay in the Zone, Not the Chaos
hero.subheadline: Flowdesk transforms how remote professionals manage work, turning scattered tasks into a streamlined productivity system that keeps you focused and in control.
hero.image_prompt: Modern workspace with a sleek laptop showing a productivity app interface. Clean, minimalist design with soft blue and purple tones. Professional home office setting with natural light.

features.title: Smart Task Prioritization
features.description: Our AI-powered algorithm automatically ranks your to-dos by urgency and potential impact, ensuring you always focus on what matters most.

features.title: Distraction-Free Work Zones
features.description: Create customized work environments that block notifications, manage background noise, and help you maintain laser-sharp concentration.

features.title: Adaptive Time Tracking
features.description: Intelligent time tracking that learns your work patterns, provides insights into your productivity, and helps you optimize your daily workflow.

testimonials.quote: Flowdesk has completely transformed how I manage my freelance projects. I'm more focused and productive than ever.
testimonials.author: Sarah Martinez, Graphic Designer

stats: Average time saved: 7 hours per week

cta_section.headline: Reclaim Your Productivity, Unleash Your Potential
cta_section.subheadline: Join thousands of remote professionals who've revolutionized their work with Flowdesk.
